body.title: Implement log rotation for oversized log files
body.result: RotatingFileHandler 50MB/3 backups — existing 397MB memory.log rotates on first write after Igor restart
body.description: memory.log is 396MB, master.log is 45MB (both >10MB). Add log rotation to avoid disk bloat. Use Python logrotate or script in cron. Tool: create_rotated_log_handle() or use logging.handlers.RotatingFileHandler. Daily rotation or size-based (e.g. 50MB max). Audit finding 2026-04-03.
